description: Firefox crashes immediately on launch on Linux with hardware acceleration enabled. Crash signature points to the compositor bridge.
resolution_note: Null-check the widget before creating the compositor session.

short_desc: TypeError: can't access property length of null in Array map polyfill
description:
Loading bookmarks throws a TypeError from the ArrayUtils map polyfill when the input is null.
TypeError: can't access property "length", arr is null
    at map (resource://gre/modules/ArrayUtils.js:52:18)
    at loadBookmarks (resource://app/modules/Bookmarks.js:210:9)
    at async init (resource://app/modules/Startup.js:88:5)
resolution_note: Guard against null input in ArrayUtils.map.

short_desc: Bookmarks lost after a crash during sync
description: If the browser crashes mid-sync, the local bookmarks database is truncated and entries are lost.
resolution_note: Write bookmarks atomically via a temp file + rename.

short_desc: Memory leak in HTTP cache under heavy load
description: Under sustained load, RSS grows steadily; the HTTP cache never evicts entries whose channels errored out.
resolution_note: Release cache entries on channel error.

short_desc: Browser crashes at startup on Linux with GPU acceleration
description: Same as the compositor startup crash. Happens on every launch with WebRender enabled.

Closing a tab quickly after load sometimes crashes:
Segmentation fault in nsDocument::Destroy (nsDocument.cpp:3120)
resolution_note: Check mPresShell for null before teardown.

description: Deleted history entries still appear as awesomebar suggestions until restart.
resolution_note: Deferred; suggestion cache refresh is expensive.

short_desc: WebGL context lost causes the tab to freeze
description: When the GPU driver resets, the WebGL context is lost and the tab hangs instead of recovering.

short_desc: Settings search returns no results for 'proxy'
description: Typing 'proxy' in the settings search box returns nothing even though proxy settings exist.
resolution_note: Index the connection settings section for search.

short_desc: Infinite recursion (stack overflow) in Promise resolution
description: A self-resolving promise causes InternalError: too much recursion and crashes the JS engine.
resolution_note: Detect self-resolution and reject with TypeError per spec.
